item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, kesadaran akan kebutuhan kolektif sering kali mendominasi, namun ini bisa memicu ketimpangan jika tidak ada perlindungan terhadap hak-hak individu.

notes: Agent A stays consistently balanced: it rejects a simple society-over-rights priority while still emphasizing collective interests and legal protection of rights. Agent B begins with a balance frame but becomes more explicitly critical of collective decisions, weak rights protection, and minority exclusion. Mandarin and Indonesian text are readable enough to score directly.
